resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def isPrefixString(self, s: str, words: List[str]) -> bool:
        i = 0
        for w in words:
            if s[i:i+len(w)] != w:
                return False
            i += len(w)
            if i == len(s):
                return True
        return False
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Iterate through words while building the concatenated prefix in-place; compare slices of s to each word. Return True as soon as the running length matches len(s) and all slices matched; otherwise return False.
